description: Modify the Jitsi Meet server configuration to enforce a 'silent join' policy where all users join with audio and video muted by default and the pre-join screen is disabled. Apply these changes to the custom web configuration file at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js and restart the Jitsi Meet services in /home/ga/jitsi. Verify the policy by joining a test meeting named 'silent-join-test' and create a verification file at /home/ga/silent_join_result.txt stating that the policy is active.
